title: Deptt of Consumer Affairs, M/o CAF&PD - Pulses Control Order
description: Deptt of Consumer Affairs, M/o CAF&PD - Pulses Control Order
text: No. S-1014l2016-ECR&E Government of India Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food and Public Distribution Department of Consumer Affairs To Krishi Bhawan. New [)elhi-110001 )ated the 1711May, 2017 The Secretary, Food, Civil Supplies & Consumer Affairs Department Government of All States/UTs .. Sub: Removal of pulses from the enabling order No. G.S.R. £29(E) dated 29.09.2016- with immediate effect Sir/Madam, I am directed to convey that 'Pulses' have been renoved from the Central Governments order No. G.S.R. 929(E) dated 29.09.2016 under the EC:Act, 1955 with immediate effect. Vide the order, all StatesiUts were enabled to impose licensir 9 & control under the EC Act, 1955. Henceforth till further orders the controls imposed by the States/Uts on pulses are to be denotified immediately. Therefore all the States & Uts requested te denotify pulses from their orders issued under the EC Act, immediately. This issu~with the approval of the competent authOrity. J 955 (10 of 1955). the Central Government hereby makes the followinz order further to amend the Removal of Licensing Requirements. Stock Limits and Movement Restrictions on Specified Foodstuffs Order. 2016. namely;- I. ( I) This order may be called the Removal of Licensing Requirements, Stock Limits and Movement Restrictions on Specified Foodstuffs (Second Amendment) Order. 2017. (.2) It shall come into force on the date of publication in the official Gazette. 2. In the Removal of Licensing Requirements. Stock limits and Movement Restrictions on Specified Foodstum Order• .2016.in clause 3. in sub-clause (2). item (i) shall be omitted. [F. No. S.1042016-ECR&Ej P. V. RAl\.Lo\SASTRY. JI. Secy.
